blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 212 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
